name: file-uploader
title: File Uploader
description: Click, drag, or paste target for files with consumer-owned validation. Defaults to images. Use the tile variant for compact square or circle add and replace controls such as profile photos.

api.description: Click, drag, or paste upload target. Defaults to images; pass pickFile for other media. Validation and copy stay with the consumer. Use variant tile for compact add or replace controls such as profile photos. Idle chrome is tokenized via --df-file-uploader-*.

props.name: onFile
props.description: Called when a file passes validation (required).

props.name: validateFile
props.description: Return an error message to reject the file, or null to accept.

props.name: onReject
props.description: Called with the rejection message from validateFile.

props.name: accept
props.description: File input accept attribute.

props.name: pickFile
props.description: Choose a candidate from a drop or browse list. Defaults to the first image file.

props.name: enablePaste
props.description: Listen for image paste on the window while mounted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and paste handling.

props.name: variant
props.description: default is a full-width drop target. tile is a fixed square or circle control for add and replace flows such as profile photos.

props.name: shape
props.description: Tile corner shape. rounded uses radius-lg. circle uses a full pill radius. Ignored on default.

props.name: size
props.description: Tile edge length. Maps to --df-file-uploader-tile-size-*. Ignored on default. Override with --df-file-uploader-tile-size for a custom length.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading inside the uploader.

props.name: description
props.default: "or click to browse. Paste also works." (default) or hidden (tile)
props.description: Secondary line under the title. Pass null or an empty value to hide it.

props.name: hint
props.description: Optional tertiary hint (formats, size limits).

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon. Defaults to ImagePlus. Pass a custom node to replace it.

props.name: previewSrc
props.description: Image URL for a filled replace state. Covers the shell and hides the idle icon and copy. Host manages object URL lifecycle.

props.name: borderStyle
props.description: Idle border style. Sets --df-file-uploader-border-style.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Idle border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--border). Sets --df-file-uploader-border-color.

props.name: background
props.description: Idle fill. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted) or transparent. Sets --df-file-uploader-bg.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the uploader shell.

props.name: Browse dialog
props.description: After the native file dialog closes (file chosen or cancelled), focus leaves the file input when it is still the active element. Host shortcuts such as Space are not kept on the uploader.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-min-height
props.description: Minimum height for the default variant.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-border-style
props.description: Idle border style.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-border-color
props.description: Idle border color.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-bg
props.description: Idle fill.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-border-color-hover
props.description: Border color on hover.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-bg-hover
props.description: Fill on hover.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-border-color-active
props.description: Border color while dragging a file over the uploader.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-bg-active
props.description: Fill while dragging a file over the uploader.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-size
props.description: Resolved tile edge length. Override for a custom tile size.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-size-sm
props.description: Tile size sm.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-size-md
props.description: Tile size md.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-size-lg
props.description: Tile size lg.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-size-xl
props.description: Tile size xl.

props.name: --df-file-uploader-tile-radius
props.description: Tile corner radius. Circle shape sets this to radius-full.

props.name: --radius-lg
props.description: Default and rounded-tile corner radius.

props.name: --radius-full
props.description: Circle tile corner radius.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
